mnemonics.title: Primitive Types
mnemonics.content: Byte, Short, Int, Long, Float, Double, Char, Boolean - 'B SILLY DOG Caught Balls'

mnemonics.title: Variable Types
mnemonics.content: Local, Instance, Static - 'LISa' helps remember variable types

mnemonics.title: Type Conversion
mnemonics.content: Widen, Narrow - 'Wide Narrow' or 'WN' to remember automatic type promotion and explicit casting
